summary: Iteration 135: Tested PWA push notification endpoints and service worker. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages (Dashboard, Sacred Texts, VR) load correctly. Service worker sw.js is accessible and contains push event listener.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA push notification system fully tested. Endpoints tested: GET /api/notifications/vapid-public-key (returns VAPID key), GET /api/notifications/status (returns subscribed boolean and preferences), POST /api/notifications/preferences (updates user prefs), GET /api/notifications/quantum-coherence (returns coherence_score and state), GET /api/notifications/inbox (returns notifications array and unread_count), POST /api/notifications/read-all (marks all as read). Service worker at /sw.js contains push event listener and notificationclick handler. Frontend NotificationSettings.js component handles subscribe/unsubscribe with PushManager API.

backend_api_tests.test_notification_status: PASS - GET /api/notifications/status returns subscribed boolean and preferences object
backend_api_tests.test_update_preferences: PASS - POST /api/notifications/preferences updates user notification preferences
backend_api_tests.test_quantum_coherence: PASS - GET /api/notifications/quantum-coherence returns coherence_score and state
backend_api_tests.test_inbox: PASS - GET /api/notifications/inbox returns notifications array and unread_count

frontend_pages.sacred_texts: PASS - /sacred-texts loads with search input and text cards
frontend_pages.vr_page: PASS - /vr loads with Cosmic Sanctuary canvas
